tools.name: Avibe
tools.oneLiner: Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode are incredible.
tools.description:
Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode are incredible. But:
- 🖥️ Trapped on one machine. Your agent lives in a terminal. Close the laptop and it stops.
- 📵 Out of reach. Away from your desk, you can't see what it's doing — let alone steer it.
- 🔒 Locked in. Every tool wants to be the whole stack: its app, its cloud, its subscription, your code uploaded to someone else's box.

tools.name: CodeSage Pro

tools.description:
Overview
AI coding assistant for every website. Finds bugs, explains code & reviews security. 25 free AI calls/month.
CodeSage Pro – AI Coding Assistant for Developers CodeSage Pro is a powerful AI coding assistant that works directly in your browser. Analyze coding challenges, generate complete working solutions, debug errors, review security issues, explain complex code, and improve development

tools.name: Omni
tools.oneLiner: Semantic search over your local files, running entirely on-device.
tools.description:
Semantic search over your local files, running entirely on-device.
Omni indexes your files and lets you search them by meaning instead of filename. A
text query finds matching documents, code, PDFs, images, audio, and video together,
because everything is embedded into one shared vector space. The model runs in-process
on Apple GPUs via a native MLX-Swift port of jina-embeddings-v5-omni

tools.description:
The open-source, read-only AI SRE.
ninoxAI turns alert storms into incidents, investigates root cause over your live systems, and proposes human-approved fixes — without ever touching production.
Quickstart · AI SRE · Demo lab · Docs · Discord

tools.name: VibeOS
tools.description:
First ever AI-native operating system. From hardware to UI –
Claude Code controls everything on your computer
Watch how vibeOS transforms your ideas into reality. From simple prompts to fully functional applications - everything happens instantly on your screen.
No coding required. Just tell vibeOS what you want to build, and watch the magic happen.
